attributes.title: [MongoDB OTel] Capacity
attributes.description: Connection utilization, memory usage, storage, and resource saturation signals.

This dashboard monitors MongoDB resource utilization:
- Current and available connection counts by server
- Connection utilization based on current vs available connections
- Memory usage (resident, virtual)
- Storage, data, and index sizes by database
- Cursor and session counts
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "9dc13894-6108-6a5b-f6a5-61e0031efa5d", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 12, "h": 4, "i": "9dc13894-6108-6a5b-f6a5-61e0031efa5d"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Current Connections", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "c15775eb-38d1-b901-9625-92f39c63ea16", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "eec281d1-0c73-c2aa-caf2-ad6ed2541fe0", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default

"labelMajorMode": "auto", "colorMode": "palette", "palette": {"name": "custom", "type": "palette", "params": {"steps": 3, "name": "custom", "reverse": false, "rangeType": "number", "rangeMin": 0.0, "rangeMax": 1.0, "progression": "fixed", "stops": [{"color": "#54b399", "stop": 0.7}, {"color": "#d6bf57", "stop": 0.85}, {"color": "#cc5642", "stop": 1.0}], "colorStops": [{"color": "#54b399", "stop": 0.0}, {"color": "#d6bf57", "stop": 0.7}, {"color": "#cc5642", "stop": 0.85}], "continuity": "above", "maxSteps": 3}}}, "query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.mongodb.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_per_server = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.connection.count)) WHERE attributes.type == "current",
       avail_per_server = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.connection.count)) WHERE attributes.type == "available"
  BY resource.attributes.server.address
| STATS current = SUM(current_per_server), avail = SUM(avail_per_server)
| EVAL util = CASE((current + avail) > 0, current / (current + avail), 0),
       gauge_min = 0.0, gauge_max = 1.0, gauge_goal = 0.7
| STATS ratio = MAX(util), gauge_min = MAX(gauge_min), gauge_max = MAX(gauge_max), gauge_goal = MAX(gauge_goal)
"}, "filters": [], "datasourceStates": {"textBased": {"layers": {"5c508be9-f5ba-860d-b2c9-966592ccf3bc": {"query": {"esql": "TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default

| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| FORK (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.cursor.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS val = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.cursor.count))
      BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
    | EVAL metric = "cursors"
  )
  (
    WHERE metrics.mongodb.session.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS val = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.session.count))
      BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
    | EVAL metric = "sessions"
  )
| STATS val = MAX(val) BY time_bucket, metric
| SORT time_bucket ASC
